name: Slime Dreamscape
short_description: Slime Dreamscape is a 2D pixel-style puzzle casual game. The core mechanic of the game is that elements of the same color can interact with each other. Players need to cleverly use various items to help the slime successfully eat the cake.
detailed_description:
Slime Dreamscape is a 2D pixel-style puzzle casual game. The core mechanic of the game is that elements of the same color can interact with each other. Players will need to think strategically and make use of various items and mechanics to guide the slime successfully eats the cake.

Game Features

  • Multiple Chapters and Levels

    Explore a variety of themed chapters. With more than 65 levels to play, you'll encounter new challenges and ways to interact with the environment in each chapter.

  • Various interactive items and mechanics

    Use a variety of in-game items, such as color changers, teleporters, gravity capsules, and more, to help the slime navigate through tricky obstacles. You'll need careful timing and creative thinking to overcome challenges and reach the cake in every level.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Turkish, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Arabic, Korean
